MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Stan Bair, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Tony Daviddauskis, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff The Granada Inc.
Richard Michael Lieberman representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Michael Wood is present.
Mathew S. Weiler representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed.

This case settled, the trial date of April 1, 2008 is vacated.
